content.en:
At this moment, Ye Tian finally knew why the Dao Strange Thing was so precious.

"At the beginning, Miao An looked at the Xuanming Drum of the Supreme Dao Strange Thing, both fear and desire, it seems that she knew that the Supreme Dao Strange Thing contained the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rule Item!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, it is too difficult to kill the Dodge Monster.

For example, in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, the strength of the Supreme Dao Strange Thing is comparable to the top Quadruple Dao Realm, and only the Twofold Dao Realm is allowed to enter here at most, so what kind of price do you have to pay if you want to kill the Supreme Dao Strange Thing?

Fighting alone, other Dao realms will definitely not be able to do it.

I'm afraid that I have to need all kinds of treasures to limit the strength of the Dao Strange Things, suppress the Dao Strange Things, and use various Dao Secret Treasures and many other means, and I have to send a large number of Double Dao Realms.

Only when all means are used can there be hope of taking out a supreme artifact.

And if you do this, it is easy to have problems, such as encountering more strange things, then it will be dead.

Therefore, Taisu Palace did not dare to hunt down strange things.

"With such a fragment of the Xuanming Drum that contains the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao, I have the hope of comprehending the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao, and then this replica body will comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following days, he wanted to kill more Supreme Dao Strange Things, but the Xuanming Drum was undoubtedly the weakest Supreme Dao Strange Thing, and it would be a little difficult to kill other Supreme Dao Strange Things, unless he could greatly improve his strength.

After all, his ability to kill the Xuanying Drum this time was the result of his many copying talents together, and he also restrained the other party a little.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to kill it.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian silently comprehended the rules of the Supreme Dao, and the rules of the ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao improved little by little, which was much better than the effect of comprehending in the Great Array of the Guiding Dao.

The ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules of the Great Array of Initiation Dao had no significance for him to comprehend, but this fragment was very meaningful, and there were many Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao rules contained in it, which was enough for him to comprehend for a long time.

Unconsciously, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

With the help of this fragment of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Xuanying Drum, Ye Tian had already comprehended the Ninth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm.

If he was in the outside world, he wouldn't be able to do this at all, let alone spend hundreds of thousands of Dao years, even if it took millions of Dao years, don't even think about raising the rules of the Supreme Dao from the ninth sequence ninety into two realm to the ninety out of three realm.

It's a harsh reality, but that's it.

It's like the True Yang and True River Valley Lords, how long the years of cultivation are, a supreme Dao era is three million and six hundred thousand Dao years.

Millions of years of solstice are just one era of the supreme path.

There are so many supreme realm powerhouses, and the years of cultivation are all measured in ten thousand!

Therefore, it is too normal that there has been no progress in several solstice eras.

It's just that Ye Tian has made too fast progress along the way, so he feels that the time is very long.

"The ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules is complete, and the next thing is to comprehend a trace of the eighth Supreme Dao rules, once I comprehend it, my strength will skyrocket!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After that, he worked hard to comprehend the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao, and did his best to comprehend it.

And that's going to take a long time.

100,000 to the year of the Tao!

Millions to the year!

An era of solstice!

Ten Solstice Ages!

In these years, Ye Tian has also scraped away many resources from the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and these resources are enough for him to cultivate for a long time.

Moreover, his cultivation has also improved a lot, and it is estimated that he has reached the middle stage of the Dao realm.

His foundation is terrifying, and this is already a very good improvement.

It's just that in these years, he didn't kill the second Dao Strange Thing, maybe he killed a Supreme Dao Strange Thing, causing those slightly weaker Supreme Dao Strange Things to avoid him, and the Supreme Dao Strange Things he encountered were all very terrifying, and he couldn't kill them at all.

For example, the sword-shaped supreme Taoist strange thing, he can't kill it.

"Only by comprehending the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao can you kill such a strange thing of the Supreme Dao!"

"I'm only a little bit away from comprehending the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's been another time.

When Ye Tian was contemplating the fragments of the Xuanming Drum, he suddenly tore through the mist of the Supreme Dao Rules.

In the past, the shackles that had been preventing him from comprehending the rules of the Eighth Sequence of the Supreme Dao were gone.

Epiphany, many realizations emerged, and the aura of the eighth sequence of Dao rules slowly spread out from him.

"Comprehended, the eighth sequence of supreme rules!"

Only by truly comprehending the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he knew how many times stronger the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were than the Ninth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and the two could not be compared at all!

Even, he felt that the supreme supernatural powers he had created were very flawed.

"The Supreme Dao Divine Powers I created before are all the ninth sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers, and they are not very powerful to me now, and I have to create the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers in order to make my strength continue to skyrocket and have terrifying lethality!"

Of course, even if you use the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules to urge the ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power, it can still increase the power of the Supreme Dao Divine Power several times.

"You can go and kill other Dao monsters!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

What's more, he needs the eighth sequence of supreme rule items, and the fragments of the Xuanming Drum in his hand have consumed a lot, although he can still comprehend for many years, but the effect is already decreasing.

So, he needed other Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

After that, he was looking for the Wonder of the Dow, and finally came across the Wonder of the Dow again not long after.

"The Heavenly Splitting Sword!"

The strange humanoid figure appeared with a sword on its back, exuding a terrifying aura of supreme rules.

That's the supreme rule of the eighth sequence!

When Ye Tian approached the other party, the strange humanoid figure pulled out the Sky Splitting Sword.

Airplanes!

The extremely fast sword slash was very simple and unpretentious, and it didn't seem to be a powerful move, but it used the power of the Supreme Dao rules to the extreme.

If it were my past self, it would be extremely difficult to cope with this trick.

But now, he used the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules to merge into the ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power to the Dao Vajra Body, and shook this sword hard.

Bang!

Ye Tian's body was knocked away, and a wound was cut out of the Supreme Dao Vajra body.

However, it was only a minor injury, and there was nothing big about him.

"Sure enough, I can now resist the attack of the Heavenly Splitting Sword, a strange thing!"

Ye Tian was excited.

In the past, he couldn't have done that.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules to integrate into the Dao Extreme Spear Technique, attacking the Dao Strange Object Sky Splitting Sword.

Thundered!!!!

A great war broke out.

Ye Tian completely crushed the opponent and defeated the opponent one after another.

The next moment.

A copy of Ye Tian's body appeared around him, surrounding the Heavenly Splitting Sword.
